elements.title: Douglas Adams
elements.contents: ... that Douglas Adams (pictured) described the sudden success of The Hitchhiker's Guide as like "having an orgasm without the foreplay"?

elements.title: a Serbian village
elements.contents: ... that a Serbian village is named after Vladimir Putin?

elements.title: Defense of Beijing
elements.contents: ... that local residents hurled stones and bricks from rooftops during the Defense of Beijing in 1449, allowing Ming reinforcements to drive back the Oirats?

elements.title: Rhode Island PBS
elements.contents: ... that the director of Rhode Island PBS confronted the state's governor in a sandwich shop to ask for funding?

elements.title: Nintendo Switch Sports Resort
elements.contents: ... that thumb wrestling is one of twelve sports featured in Nintendo Switch Sports Resort?

elements.title: Devon Again
elements.contents: ... that Devon Again was the second artist signed to her record label, after Chappell Roan?

elements.title: Quakers in Costa Rica
elements.contents: ... that the first Quakers in Costa Rica founded the city of Monteverde after fleeing from the United States?

elements.title: Mark Rosenblatt
elements.contents: ... that Mark Rosenblatt still reads Roald Dahl's books to his children, despite Rosenblatt's play Giant depicting Dahl's antisemitism?

elements.title: Viking
elements.contents: ... that a Viking played in the National Hockey League?
